name: chr17p11_pericentric_alpha_HSat
description: Chromosome 17 p-arm pericentric flank (17p11.1-17p11.2), the immediate sub-centromeric LCR shoreline on the p-side of the chr17 centromere. Distally adjoins the SMS-REPs (Smith-Magenis/Potocki-Lupski 17p11.2). Alpha-satellite (D17Z1/D17Z1-B), pericentromeric SDs and HSat patches. Resolved in T2T-CHM13.

architecture.internal_structure: alpha-sat HOR (dual D17Z1/D17Z1-B, hottest-studied epiallele system in humans) + HSat patches + pericentromeric SD shoreline; distally adjoins SMS-REP LCR system.
